title: Agent Performance
description: Per-agent runtime metrics: turns, tokens, duration, tracer bullet breakdown

panels.title: Average Turns Over Time
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as day, ROUND(AVG(CAST(runtime_num_turns AS DOUBLE)), 1) as avg_turns FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name = 'runtime.spawn_agent' AND runtime_num_turns IS NOT NULL AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

panels.title: Avg Duration by Tracer Bullet (seconds)
panels.query: SELECT operation_name as tb, ROUND(AVG(CAST(duration AS DOUBLE) / 1000000), 1) as avg_seconds FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name LIKE 'tb%.run' AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY tb ORDER BY avg_seconds DESC

panels.title: Runs by Persona
panels.query: SELECT COALESCE(tb1_persona, tb2_persona, tb3_persona, tb4_persona, tb5_persona, tb6_persona) as persona, COUNT(*) as runs FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name LIKE 'tb%.phase.persona' AND COALESCE(tb1_persona, tb2_persona, tb3_persona, tb4_persona, tb5_persona, tb6_persona) IS NOT NULL AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY persona

panels.title: Token Usage Over Time
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as day, SUM(CAST(runtime_input_tokens AS BIGINT)) as input_tokens, SUM(CAST(runtime_output_tokens AS BIGINT)) as output_tokens FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name = 'runtime.spawn_agent' AND runtime_input_tokens IS NOT NULL AND runtime_output_tokens IS NOT NULL AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

panels.title: Context Restarts by Persona
panels.query: SELECT COALESCE(tb1_persona, tb4_persona) as persona, SUM(CAST(runtime_context_restarts AS INT)) as restarts FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name IN ('tb1.run', 'tb4.run') AND runtime_context_restarts IS NOT NULL AND CAST(runtime_context_restarts AS INT) > 0 AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY persona ORDER BY restarts DESC

panels.title: Context % at Exit (Distribution)
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as day, ROUND(AVG(CAST(runtime_context_pct AS DOUBLE)), 1) as avg_context_pct, ROUND(MAX(CAST(runtime_context_pct AS DOUBLE)), 1) as max_context_pct FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name = 'runtime.spawn_agent' AND runtime_context_pct IS NOT NULL AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day
